response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience in agentic AI systems at scale, fintech infrastructure, or regulated AI deployment, despite claiming exposure to AI-agent tooling; their background is primarily full-stack web/mobile development with niche contributions in GIS and DLang, and there is no evidence of leading engineering teams beyond 10 people or designing real-time credit/liquidity systems required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across diverse languages and systems
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems in non-fintech contexts
concerns: No verifiable production experience with multi-agent AI frameworks in financial systems
Lacks documented leadership scaling teams to 30+ or governing hybrid engineering models
No evidence of fintech domain knowledge (credit risk, working capital, compliance)
